description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Bazel that runs on push to master and on pull requests. The workflow has three ubuntu jobs: test with Bazel 5.3.0 on ubuntu-22.04 with various hardware and parallelism optimizers, test with sanitizers, and test with tcmalloc on ubuntu-20.04. Each job checks out the repository, sets up Bazel, installs requirements, and runs C++ tests with different configurations.
